name: Ikura Gold Nigiri
descriptionSnippets: Finally, fish eggs AND gold leaf on the same bite — because apparently just one thing to flex wasn't enough
Your bank account cried. Your mouth did not

name: Torched Salmon Parade
descriptionSnippets: Twenty rolls standing in a line like they're waiting to get into a club and they all got in
The chef spent 45 minutes arranging this. The table destroyed it in 4 minutes

name: Kawaii Panda Bento
descriptionSnippets: The chef spent three hours making these adorable little panda faces and you're about to demolish them without hesitation
Therapy is cheaper but this hits different

name: Lone Salmon Nigiri
descriptionSnippets: One piece. One fish. One rice. The photographer used a ring light and mood music for this
It's literally just salmon on rice but somehow it has main character energy

name: Black Moon Tamago Roll
descriptionSnippets: Looks like something you'd find in a villain's lair but somehow it's just egg and sesame
The goth kid at the sushi party. Still delicious. Especially at 2am

name: Glitter Omakase Platter
descriptionSnippets: Someone looked at perfectly good sushi and thought 'what if I made it MORE' and honestly we respect the vision
Will end up all over your shirt. Worth it

name: Shrimp Tempura Crunch Roll
descriptionSnippets: Shrimp got deep-fried, wrapped in rice, and sent to your mouth. The shrimp had no complaints about any of this
The crunch is so loud your table neighbors will give you a look. Eat it anyway

name: The Sushi Wedding Cake
descriptionSnippets: Someone built a three-tier cake out of sushi and nobody stopped them. This is the world we live in and it rules
Do you cut it? Do you disassemble it? Do you just cry? Yes. All three

name: Sakura Salmon Sashimi
descriptionSnippets: Salmon fanned out with a flower on top like it's going to prom and it absolutely deserves the corsage
You will spend 40 seconds photographing it and 8 seconds eating it. No regrets

name: Salmon Avocado Press Cake
descriptionSnippets: Someone stacked sushi into a cylinder and called it a torte. The audacity. The deliciousness. The nerve
You will absolutely post this before eating it and that is the correct decision

name: Super-Sized Gimbap
descriptionSnippets: Regular gimbap got tired of being underestimated and went absolutely feral
Each slice is the size of a hockey puck. This is not a problem. This is a blessing

name: Critter Character Sushi
descriptionSnippets: The chef studied art for six years to make something shaped like a cartoon and we are deeply grateful
It has eyes. It's looking at you. Eat it before it judges you further

name: Rainbow Salmon & Tuna Lineup
descriptionSnippets: An entire line-up of fish suspects and you have to eat every single one of them
Colour-coded by fish type because the chef is organised and low-key judging your life choices

name: Bluefin Tuna Reveal
descriptionSnippets: A chef holding an entire tuna like a baby and honestly the tuna looks more relaxed than the chef
This fish is like 800 dollars. Please don't take a bite and say 'eh it's fine'

name: Sesame Nori Onigiri
descriptionSnippets: Rice in a triangle. Sounds boring. Is never boring. Scientists are baffled
Technically not a roll, technically not nigiri, technically perfect and you won't hear otherwise

name: Teriyaki Sesame Roll
descriptionSnippets: Rolls dunked in teriyaki and rolled in sesame like they had an appointment with greatness and showed up early
You will get sauce on your phone screen. You will not care

name: Volcano Spicy Tuna Roll
descriptionSnippets: Geologists have confirmed this roll is technically a natural disaster site and FEMA is not responding
Your nose will run. Your eyes will water. You will order another immediately

name: Pressed Salmon Oshi
descriptionSnippets: Sushi pressed into a perfect rectangle because someone at this restaurant has an engineering degree and isn't afraid to use it
Every edge is a perfect right angle. Your life will never be this organised

name: Pomegranate Tuna Roll
descriptionSnippets: Someone put pomegranate on a tuna roll and everyone at the table went quiet for a second before agreeing it was genius
You'll spend 10 minutes explaining it to your friends and worth every second

name: Shrimp Tempura Parade
descriptionSnippets: Look at them all lined up like they're waiting for inspection. They passed. They all passed
Each roll is crispier than your last dating profile. And infinitely more likeable

name: Baked Spicy Salmon Roll
descriptionSnippets: Sushi that decided the oven was a reasonable way to enter any situation
The spicy mayo zigzag was drawn with the confidence of someone who never second-guesses themselves

name: Honey Sesame Salmon Roll
descriptionSnippets: Glazed in honey like it's trying to get a 5-star review on Yelp and it absolutely deserves it
You'll pick up the last piece before anyone else can and then pretend you didn't plan to

name: Black Sesame Avocado Roll
descriptionSnippets: The health-conscious roll that showed up to a party full of deep-fried things and still had a great time
Your nutritionist would approve. Your nutritionist has no idea how many you ate

name: Unagi Dark Tide Roll
descriptionSnippets: This roll has the energy of someone who listens to deep house music and owns a lot of black turtlenecks
Mysterious. Sticky. You don't know what's going on but you're fully invested

name: Love Heart Tuna Roll
descriptionSnippets: Someone sliced a roll and there was a perfect heart inside. This was not an accident. This was a threat
Extremely romantic. Also fish. That combination should not work. It does

name: Spicy Crab Crunch Roll
descriptionSnippets: Crab showed up spicy and nobody told it to calm down and that was the right call
The crunch will betray your location. Everyone at the table will look at you. Crunch again defiantly

name: Classic Shrimp Tempura Roll
descriptionSnippets: The reliable friend of the sushi menu. Always there. Never cancels. Absolutely battered
You've had this a hundred times and you'll have it a hundred more. This is your destiny

name: Salmon Rainbow Maki
descriptionSnippets: Thick as a hockey puck, colorful as a fever dream, delicious as a fever dream about sushi
You will underestimate how filling this is and then immediately regret underestimating it

name: Spicy Tuna Overdrive
descriptionSnippets: Someone asked 'what if the outside was also the inside?' and the answer was chaos and it was perfect
There is no roll visible under all this topping. That is a feature, not a bug

name: Salmon Nigiri Set
descriptionSnippets: Salmon just lying there looking gorgeous on rice, not trying to be anything else, fully winning at life
The most unbothered item on the entire menu and honestly good for it

name: Dragon Shrimp Roll
descriptionSnippets: A roll dressed up as a dragon because regular rolls are boring and this chef has something to prove
Zero dragons were harmed in the making of this roll. The avocado had a rough day though

name: Spicy Salmon Crunch Roll
descriptionSnippets: Spicy salmon in a crunchy roll topped with tiny eggs — it's like an action movie but edible
Your mouth will be slightly on fire. You will tip well for this experience

name: Tuna Avocado Maki
descriptionSnippets: Tuna and avocado in a roll — the sushi equivalent of putting ketchup and fries together — obviously correct
No drama. No gimmicks. Just two things that are great and decided to hang out

name: Spicy Tuna Masago Blast
descriptionSnippets: The roll is in there somewhere beneath this avalanche of masago. Trust the process
You'll get fish eggs in your teeth and smile the entire time

name: Salmon Takeout Oshi
descriptionSnippets: Salmon oshi served in a takeout box because fine dining should be accessible from your car if necessary
Box sushi that gives off the vibe of someone who wears a suit but also owns a skateboard

name: Yellowtail Scallion Nigiri
descriptionSnippets: Yellowtail so fresh it probably had plans today before this happened
One scallion on top minding its own business. Respect that scallion

name: Philly Cream Salmon Roll
descriptionSnippets: Cream cheese in sushi — a decision that scandalized Japan and delighted everyone else
Your sushi purist friend will roll their eyes. They will also eat three of them

name: Shrimp Boston Roll
descriptionSnippets: Shrimp was poached and that sounds violent but it was actually the best thing that ever happened to it
Named after Boston despite Boston having very little to do with it. Classic Boston move

name: Salmon Alaska Roll
descriptionSnippets: Salmon flew all the way from Alaska to be in this roll. The least you can do is eat it with enthusiasm
No tricks. No gimmicks. Just fish doing what fish does best: being delicious

name: Spicy Tuna Tobiko Roll
descriptionSnippets: The tobiko pops in your mouth like a tiny ocean firework and nothing has ever been more satisfying
Sounds like bubble wrap when you eat it. This is a feature not a flaw

name: Unagi Teriyaki Maki
descriptionSnippets: Eel glazed in sauce that could double as candy syrup. The eel has no complaints
Sweet enough to serve at dessert, bold enough to make your doctor nervous. Perfect

name: Las Vegas Baked Roll
descriptionSnippets: This roll made decisions that a regular roll would never make and we are living better lives because of it
Three sauces, two layers, zero restraint. Las Vegas would be proud

name: Avocado Dragon Roll
descriptionSnippets: An avocado gave its life to become scales on a sushi dragon and honestly that's a legendary way to go
The chef spent 20 minutes on the presentation. You'll spend 20 seconds on the destruction

name: Tiger Spicy Tuna Roll
descriptionSnippets: Striped in sauce like an actual tiger, which is the most unhinged and excellent way to design a roll
Spicy, patterned, feral. Like a tiger but you can eat it and it's encouraged

name: Eel Caterpillar Roll
descriptionSnippets: A roll that looks like a caterpillar which should be off-putting but is somehow the most charming thing on the menu
One day this roll will become a butterfly. Today it becomes your lunch

name: Tornado Salmon Roll
descriptionSnippets: A hand roll that spirals like a tornado and hits your taste buds with the same energy
You did not plan to finish this entire thing in one sitting. Surprise

name: Baked Salmon Miso Roll
descriptionSnippets: Someone put sushi in an oven and instead of a catastrophe it was the greatest decision in recent culinary history
Warm, golden, and smells incredible — basically a hug that costs seventeen dollars
